nodes.label: Instruction Layer Hierarchy (workspace over user instructions)

Memory Dir and Sandbox Dir as Separate Filesystem Roots

Detail Panel as Future Per-Session Inspection Surface
Chrome Orchestrator Pattern (layout owns all session mutations)
Batch Query Invalidation on Session Mutation
Source Component Hover-Card Pattern (internal vs external links)
